# Position Specification Document

**Role:** Rendering Engineer (G15)
**Role Family:** Engineering — Rendering
**Seniority:** Senior (L2)
**Team:** Casual Games Studio — Engineering Division
**Reports To:** Dmitri Volkov (Senior Game Engineer)
**Priority:** P0

**Recruitment Phase:** Phase 3A — Engineering Ramp

---

## 1. Role Justification

The Rendering Engineer is responsible for the graphics pipeline, shader programming, GPU profiling, mobile graphics API optimization (Metal/Vulkan), and post-processing effects. This is a P0 hire required for Stage 5 (Full Production). The role sits under Dmitri Volkov's direction, owning the rendering layer that sits between the engine (Viktor Stahl, G13) and gameplay systems.

This hire is critical because mobile GPU performance is the primary constraint for achieving 60fps on mid-tier devices. A rendering engineer with Arm and Unity URP experience ensures our graphics pipeline is optimized for the dominant mobile GPU architectures (Mali, Adreno, Apple GPU).

**Pipeline Stages Owned:** 2 (Graphics Pipeline Design), 3 (Shader/Rendering Architecture), 5 (Rendering Implementation), 6 (Rendering Code Review)

---

## 2. Required Competencies (weighted)

| Competency                         | Weight | Minimum Threshold | Assessment Method                |
| ---------------------------------- | ------ | ----------------- | -------------------------------- |
| Shader Programming (HLSL/GLSL/MSL) | 25%    | ≥ 4/5             | Shader coding challenge          |
| GPU Profiling & Optimization       | 25%    | ≥ 4/5             | Profiling tool design exercise   |
| Mobile Graphics APIs               | 20%    | ≥ 4/5             | Metal/Vulkan technical interview |
| Post-Processing Pipeline           | 15%    | ≥ 3.5/5           | Post-processing system design    |
| Render Pipeline Architecture       | 10%    | ≥ 3.5/5           | URP/custom pipeline case study   |
| Team Collaboration                 | 5%     | ≥ 3/5             | Behavioral interview             |

---

## 3. Must-Have Qualifications

- 5+ years rendering/graphics programming experience
- Shader programming in HLSL, GLSL, and Metal Shading Language
- GPU profiling and optimization on mobile devices (Mali, Adreno, Apple GPU)
- Mobile graphics API experience (Metal for iOS, Vulkan for Android)
- Post-processing pipeline implementation (bloom, color grading, vignette)
- Experience with Unity URP or equivalent render pipeline

---

## 4. Nice-to-Have Qualifications

- Arm Mali GPU profiling tool development
- Contributions to Unity URP mobile path
- Adaptive resolution scaling system implementation
- Published mobile graphics optimization guides
